hints.description: This company provides a cloud-based platform enabling businesses to manage digital workflows and automate processes. Their offerings include IT service management, IT operations management, and customer service management, among others. Founded by Fred *** in 2004, it has become a leader in the enterprise workflow solutions market.
hints.funFact1: Initially, the company started as an internal project at ***, aiming to improve IT service management processes before being spun out as a separate entity.
hints.funFact2: The company's name is derived from the concept of "service now," reflecting its focus on delivering immediate and efficient service solutions.
